articles.title: APA Silences Award-Winning Psychiatrist for Challenging War Propaganda — Medical Establishment's Political Censorship Exposed
articles.summary: Dr. Mansoor Malik, a Johns Hopkins psychiatry professor, had his microphone cut by the American Psychological Association after speaking about Gaza during his human rights award acceptance. The APA's censorship reveals how medical establishments suppress dissenting voices even from their own honorees.

articles.title: Big Tech's Health Censorship Apparatus Exposed — Zuckerberg Admits Years of Biased 'Fact-Checking' Against Natural Health
articles.summary: Mark Zuckerberg's admission that Meta's fact-checking was biased confirms systematic censorship of health freedom information. The article warns this isn't genuine reform but strategic repositioning while algorithms continue suppressing natural health content.

articles.title: $3.35 Billion Pandemic Prep Fund — House Bill Sets Stage for Next 'Global Health Threat' Orchestration
articles.summary: New House legislation allocates massive funding for future pandemic response, raising questions about pre-planned health emergencies. The bill creates infrastructure for coordinated global health interventions beyond democratic oversight.

articles.title: Meta Pays 'Momfluencer' Doctors to Whitewash Child Safety Failures — Tech Giant's Astroturfing Campaign Exposed
articles.summary: Meta secretly pays Instagram influencers including doctors and psychologists with millions of followers to promote its Teen Account safety features. The Tech Transparency Project exposes this coordinated propaganda campaign disguised as independent medical advice.

articles.title: Media Hypes 'Research That Is Absurd on Its Face' — How Legitimate-Looking Studies Spread Quantitative Disinformation
articles.summary: Aaron Brown's new book exposes how mainstream media promotes fundamentally flawed research that appears legitimate but is scientifically absurd. This systematic problem goes beyond fraud to include peer-reviewed studies that mislead the public through poor methodology.
